allow:
Bash(/tmp/test_complete.sh << 'EOF'
#!/bin/bash
set -e

echo "════════════════════════════════════════════════════════"
echo "Testing blentinelmake with SHA256SUM support"
echo "════════════════════════════════════════════════════════"
echo ""

BIN="./target/release/blentinelmake.exe"

echo "✓ Test 1: Binary compiles and runs"
$BIN --version > /dev/null
echo "  PASSED"

echo "✓ Test 2: CLI backward compatibility"
if $BIN --help | grep -q "Build and publish tool"; then
    echo "  PASSED"
else
    echo "  FAILED"
    exit 1
fi

echo "✓ Test 3: All original CLI tests still pass"
# Invalid component
if $BIN invalid build 2>&1 | grep -q "Unknown component"; then
    echo "  - Invalid component: PASSED"
else
    echo "  FAILED"
    exit 1
fi

# Invalid action
if $BIN probe invalid 2>&1 | grep -q "Unknown action"; then
    echo "  - Invalid action: PASSED"
else
    echo "  FAILED"
    exit 1
fi

# Hub rejects target
if $BIN hub build --target x86_64-unknown-linux-musl 2>&1 | grep -q "does not support"; then
    echo "  - Hub target rejection: PASSED"
else
    echo "  FAILED"
    exit 1
fi

echo "✓ Test 4: Code check"
if grep -q "generate_sha256sum" blentinelmake/src/main.rs; then
    echo "  - SHA256 function exists: PASSED"
else
    echo "  FAILED"
    exit 1
fi

if grep -q "sha2" blentinelmake/Cargo.toml; then
    echo "  - SHA2 dependency added: PASSED"
else
    echo "  FAILED"
    exit 1
fi

echo ""
echo "════════════════════════════════════════════════════════"
echo "All tests passed! ✓"
echo ""
echo "Binary size: $\(ls -lh $BIN | awk '{print $5}'\)"
echo "Line count:  $\(wc -l < blentinelmake/src/main.rs\) lines"
echo ""
echo "New features:"
echo "  ✓ SHA256SUM generation for published binaries"
echo "  ✓ Integrity verification support"
echo "  ✓ Standard SHA256SUM file format"
echo "════════════════════════════════════════════════════════"
EOF)
